hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
GIT_BRANCH_SHORT=`echo ${GIT_BRANCH} | cut -d "/" -f 2` GIT_COMMIT_SHORT=`echo ${GIT_COMMIT} | cut -c1-7`
docker build --load -f docker/build.Dockerfile -t hms-dbmi/hpds-build .
docker run --rm \ -v "/var/jenkins_home/workspace/$JOB_NAME/:/app:z" \ -v maven_m2_cache:/root/.m2 \ -w /app \ hms-dbmi/hpds-build \ sh -lc "mvn clean install -DskipTests"
docker build --load -f docker/pic-sure-hpds/Dockerfile -t hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} . docker tag hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds:LATEST
docker build --load -f docker/pic-sure-hpds-etl/Dockerfile -t hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds-etl:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} . docker tag hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds-etl:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds-etl:LATEST
mkdir -p docker_image_output cd docker_image_output docker save hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} | gzip > pic-sure-hpds.tar.gz aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp pic-sure-hpds.tar.gz s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/$TARGET_STACK/containers/pic-sure-hpds.tar.gz docker save hms-dbmi/pic-sure-hpds-etl:${GIT_BRANCH_SHORT}_${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT} | gzip > pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME/$TARGET_STACK/containers/pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz
